summary: S2 (final, 2 of 2) implemented the lifecycle-embedded schema-drift advisory locked at S1. New check_migrations.summarize_drift(scan_root) reuses detect_drift and returns a terse ASCII-only one-line warning when any set under scan_root is on an older schema OR (post-IV&V) has an unreadable/corrupt session-state.json; returns None when clean -- non-blocking + fail-open (swallows its own errors so a scan failure can never disrupt a session boundary). start_session calls it after the boundary write and prints to stderr (the PRIMARY lifecycle trigger; never changes the exit code; scans dirname(abspath(session_set_dir)) = docs/session-sets). close_session emits the same as a soft note to stderr after _emit_output. Both call sites add a belt-and-suspenders try/except (also guards the print() against a closed/encoding-broken stderr). Imports added under each module's existing relative/absolute fallback pattern (bare-import lesson). Because every orchestrator (Claude, GitHub Copilot, Codex, human) runs start_session/close_session at every boundary on every host, the warning now reaches the Copilot staff the Set 050 Claude-editor-hook never covered -- with NO CI job, git hook, or editor hook (the over-engineered CI/hooks/baseline design from the S1 proposal was rejected by the operator and dropped). Live dogfood: start_session in this repo warns about its 46 sub-current sets and exits 0. Tests: 8 summarize_drift unit + 3 start_session integration; full Python suite 1036 passed / 1 skipped / 0 regressions. Doc: ai-led-session-workflow.md notes the guard rides the CLI lifecycle. Version dabbler-ai-router 0.12.0 -> 0.13.0 (pyproject + __init__ + CHANGELOG [0.13.0]); set change-log.md. Marketplace extension UNCHANGED (ai_router-only set) -- CLAUDE.md extension-versioning walk intentionally NOT touched (extension still 0.25.0). Cross-provider IV&V: gemini-pro VERIFIED, 0 critical; IMP-1 (unreadable files hidden) FIXED in-flight (+2 tests); NTH-1 (perf-on-thousands) deferred as speculative; NTH-2 (redundant try/except) kept deliberately. Routed cost $0.0106 (S2) -> cumulative $0.0468 of $10 NTE (0.47%). This is the final session; close_session flips the set to complete. Publish HELD for operator tag-push (v0.13.0 PyPI; no Marketplace tag this set).

reason.specifics: Final session of Set 053 -- no next session. Set complete on close_session. Operator follow-up (out of scope): push tag v0.13.0 to publish dabbler-ai-router 0.13.0 to PyPI (OIDC, no PAT needed); no Marketplace tag this set (extension unchanged at 0.25.0). Stubs 051 (now incl. a file/CLI naming-convention audit Q6 -- migrator names are not version-legible) and 052 remain not-started.
